mapper.sql: id, order_number, user_id, status, total_amount, delivery_address, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_number, user_id, status, total_amount, delivery_address, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNumber}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber}

UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, delivery_address = #{deliveryAddress}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{date}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{date} AND status NOT IN ('cancelled')
